creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, 

By default the RC framework already includes the flag of $name_flags from rc.conf to the command args. So continuing with this patch will result in double arguments being specified. My initial thought was to make it a bit more tweaked for FreeBSD's ZFS by default (which supports the extra flags). But it is true that we can simply alter the startup options with znapzend_flags="" form rc.conf already. Lets close it. Sorry for the noise.
